ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "file" TEXT /* File name of the product image */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock" INTEGER /* Available stock for the product */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the product */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller who listed the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the product belongs */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_images" TEXT /* List of image URLs for the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for inventory management */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product for shipping calculations */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (length, width, height) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is active (visible to customers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Full name of the seller */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the seller */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller's store */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the seller joined the platform */,
  "store_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the seller's store */,
  "store_url" TEXT /* URL of the seller's storefront */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the seller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the seller */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the seller's account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the seller account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the seller account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Clothing, Accessories) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing purposes */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the customer account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
